name: AI Usage Meter
description: Shows Claude Code and Codex (ChatGPT) usage in the status bar as a progress bar with a detail tooltip: the 5-hour rolling window and the weekly limit for each, plus a reset countdown. Each meter can be hidden from Settings. Reads your local CLI credentials/sessions; the only network call is to Claude's own usage endpoint.
author: IlhamRiski - ilhamriski.com
